content.query:
select a.*, b.ivno, ''''+c.orno as orno, ''''+cuor as cuor
from
(
select distinct ''''+fs.CINO as cino from m3.fsledg fs
) a

left join

(
select			DISTINCT IVNO, ''''+EXIN as exin
from			m3.oinvoh
) b on a .CINO = b.EXIN

left join

(
select IVNO, ORNO
from M3.ODHEAD
) c on b.ivno = c.IVNO

left join

(
select orno, cuor
from m3.oohead
) d on c.orno = d.orno
